description: You are an AI/ML data engineer preprocessing a 15-minute raw dual-frequency Air Traffic Control (ATC) recording located at /home/ga/Music/raw_sdr_capture.wav for a Speech-to-Text machine learning pipeline. Following the specifications in /home/ga/Documents/preprocessing_spec.txt, process the Left (Tower) and Right (Ground) channels to remove dead-air silence and apply bandpass filtering (300Hz-3000Hz). Export the processed audio as mono 16000 Hz, 64kbps MP3 files to /home/ga/Music/processed/tower_clean.mp3 and /home/ga/Music/processed/ground_clean.mp3. Generate visual waveform images for each at /home/ga/Pictures/diagnostics/tower_waveform.png and /home/ga/Pictures/diagnostics/ground_waveform.png. Finally, create a VLC XSPF playlist at /home/ga/Music/processed/atc_review_playlist.xspf containing both tracks and generate a processing report at /home/ga/Documents/processing_report.json.
